column1: # Kanripo gaiji ladder — lane 1 of 4: the FAITHFUL real-codepoint map (P38-1).
# The gaiji display ladder resolves each `&KR\d+;` reference, per character, in
# four descending rungs (P38-2 renders it; this packet ships the data):
#   1. FAITHFUL  — a real assigned Unicode codepoint (THIS file)
#   4. ⬚ placeholder (U+2B1A) — honest "unencoded" box, never a fake glyph.
# A ref present in an upper rung is resolved there; lower-rung entries for the
# same ref are never consulted (FAITHFUL wins). The three shipped lanes are
# ref-id <TAB> unicode-glyph. Consulted ONLY by `--display reading` on kanripo
# passages (config/display.yml → sources.kanripo.gaiji: placeholder). A ref not
# in any lane renders ⬚. diplomatic/full/default keep refs verbatim.
# FAITHFUL POLICY (charlist column 3, "unicode representation"): keep a row iff,
# after stripping surrounding whitespace, column 3 is EXACTLY ONE Unicode
# codepoint that is a REAL ASSIGNED character — i.e. NOT a Private-Use-Area
# codepoint (U+E000–F8FF, U+F0000–FFFFD, U+100000–10FFFD). Stored NFC. Dropped:
# `?`-uncertain marks, mandoku `[...]` compositions (→ IDS lane), multi-char
# cells, empties, and — new in P38-1 — 547 PRIVATE-USE rows the P37-3 table had
# shipped as "real" (they render as tofu off the mandoku font; honesty gate).
# KR0198's composition `[沔-丏+丐]` resolves (via BabelStone IDS) to ⿰氵丐,
# which is an ENCODED glyph form of 沔 (U+6C94, its Z-source decomposition), so
# it lands here, not in the IDS lane.
# census: 427, 2026-07-21, faithful refs — 36.55% of all 1,751,360 gaiji
# OCCURRENCES (was P37-3's 972 incl. 547 private-use; net −545: −547 PUA purged,
# KR-Gaiji, CC BY-SA 4.0), reconciled against Unihan + BabelStone IDS (held).
# Refresh: bin/nabu sync kr-gaiji, then regenerate (P38-1 procedure).
